items.label: Deal Count
items.definition: Distinct catastrophe bond deals in the cleaned master dataset.
items.interpretation: Historical transaction footprint represented in the platform.

items.label: Cumulative Issuance
items.definition: Sum of deal_size_usd at deal level.
items.interpretation: Historical issuance total, not outstanding stock.

items.label: Sovereign Deals
items.definition: Deals classified as sovereign by platform classification rules.
items.interpretation: Depth of sovereign catastrophe bond participation.

items.label: Non-Sovereign Deals
items.interpretation: Private market transaction depth in current coverage.

items.label: Countries Covered
items.definition: Distinct sponsor countries represented in the dataset.

items.label: Latest Market Year
items.definition: Latest issue year available in the cleaned dataset.

items.label: Outstanding Market Size
items.note: Outstanding market size not available in current dataset
items.definition: Requires full maturity/outstanding history to compute current stock.
items.interpretation: Suppressed until complete outstanding coverage is available.
